Dan Williams

Copied

One of the most highly anticipated events at Paris 2024 is the marathon which begins at 2 a.m. ET on Aug. 10. In the men芒聙聶s event, Kenya芒聙聶s Kelvin Kiptum was expected to feature in the medals after breaking the world marathon record in Chicago in 2023. But those dreams ended when Kiptum was tragically killed in a car crash in February 2024.

Benson Kipruto who came second to Kiptum in Chicago, says that both he and fellow Kenyan, defending Olympic champion Eliud Kipchoge, will do whatever it takes to win gold for Kenya and honor Kiptum.

Kipruto has been speaking with CGTN芒聙聶s Dan Williams.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.

title: Kenyan marathon runner seeks Olympic gold - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Benson Kipruto who came second to Kiptum in Chicago, says that both he and fellow Kenyan, defending Olympic champion Eliud Kipchoge, will do whatever it takes to win gold for Kenya and honor Kiptum.
